title: Brazil's Pix Sets Records
excerpt: In its continued success story, Brazil's instant payment system Pix processed over six billion transactions per month in 2024. A report from Matera, Pix by the Numbers, detailed the
body:
In its continued success story, Brazil's instant payment system Pix processed over six billion transactions per month in 2024.

A report from Matera, Pix by the Numbers, detailed the platform's transactions and found dramatic increases in both consumer and business-to-business payments, which were up 94% and 56%, respectively, year-over-year. Read the full article on paymentsjournal.com [here](https://www.paymentsjournal.com/brazils-pix-set-records-surpassing-credit-card-transactions-last-year/).
